tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall service custom
edit "TCP_8443"
set tcp-portrange 8443
next
end
config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Block_C2_egress"
set srcintf "any"
set dstintf "any"
set srcaddr "LAN_HOST_192.168.1.3"
set dstaddr "ATTACKER_C2"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "TCP_8443"
set logtraffic all
next
end"}
